cohort: patient_literacy=low (forced); clinical style; kimi:kimi-k2.5 sim + judge
protocol_note: Baseline batch used --sim-timeout-s 180 (historical run). Candidate used --sim-timeout-s 300 plus runner fixes for cancelled sims. For strictest A/B, rerun baseline with 300s and a new experiment_id.
source: Per-experiment rows in analysis_experiment.csv (not full-DB analysis.json).

closure_vs_plan_md_section_3.failure_identification: Done via analysis + prior small-n runs.
closure_vs_plan_md_section_3.diagnose_cause: Qualitative review supported low-literacy + comprehension-check hypothesis.
closure_vs_plan_md_section_3.re_run: Completed controlled n=10 low-literacy A/B after runner reliability fixes.
closure_vs_plan_md_section_3.measure_gap_closure: Documented in this file; medium effect on comprehension, large on applied reasoning.
closure_vs_plan_md_section_3.iterate: Optional: matched-timeout baseline rerun; mixed-cohort regression slice; anxiety policy A/B if failures cluster there.
